name: Manual Tracking of Mitotic Progression
description: Perform manual tracking of a dividing cell in the 'Mitosis' sample image. Create a Max Intensity Z-Projection to produce a 2D time-lapse. Identify the cell near (X=145, Y=130) at Frame 1 and record its X, Y centroid coordinates (in pixels) for Frames 1, 6, 11, 16, and 21. For Frame 21, record the right-most daughter cell. Save the results in CSV format (Frame, X, Y) to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/tracking_trace.csv.
